title: TAKE CARE OF THE DOG
description:
■ Woof woof! -Dog.It's time to play! TCOTD is a short story about... taking care of a dog! Play around, follow him, find items, and a lot more!

■ RecomendationsThis is a ‘late-night game’. Try playing it at night, with the lights off and a headset on, when everyone in your house is asleep. It's about atmosphere!

■ ControlsWalk - W A S D 
Interact - Left Mouse Button

TAKE CARE OF THE DOG is a pretty short game I made while recovering from the surgery I had after I broke my arm 
(I lost my movements, but I am slowly getting 'em back!!)

 
A new TAKE CARE OF is being developed based on your feedback! Thank you so much for the kind words.
description_short: Hello! Hi! How are you? It's time to play! TAKE CARE OF THE DOG is a short story about... taking care of a dog! Play around, follow him, find items, go get the water in the basement (for some reason) and a lot more!
